title: Fire destroys home in Buffelsnek
description: KNYSNA NEWS - A residential structure in...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - A residential structure in Buffelsnek was destroyed by fire last night, 19 June.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - A residential structure in Buffelsnek was destroyed by fire last night, 19 June."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The cause of the blaze remains unknown and no injuries was reported."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The incident comes roughly a month after the Garden Route District Municipality (GRDM) conducted a fire safety awareness campaign in the Buffelsnek community, aimed at educating residents about fire prevention and emergency response.","html":"The incident comes roughly a month after the Garden Route District Municipality (GRDM) conducted a fire safety awareness campaign in the Buffelsnek community, aimed at educating residents about fire prevention and emergency response."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This is a developing story. More information will be shared as it becomes available.","html":"This is a developing story. More information will be shared as it becomes available."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
